data.title: Namib Minerals: Operational Discipline and 2026 Growth Outlook Support Buy Rating and $9.50 Target
data.description:
Atrium Research analyst Ben Pirie maintained a Buy rating on Namib Minerals yesterday and set a price target of $9.50.

End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Ben Pirie has given his Buy rating due to a combination of factors, including solid 2025 operating performance and clear visibility on growth. Namib Minerals delivered roughly 25 thousand ounces of gold, translating into $82.6 million of revenue, healthy adjusted EBITDA of $29.0 million, and $13.8 million in operating cash flow, broadly matching expectations and demonstrating operational discipline.

Looking ahead, management’s 2026 guidance calls for higher output of 28 to 31.5 thousand ounces and a step-change in profitability, with projected adjusted EBITDA of $50 to $62 million at $4,500 per ounce gold. The planned How Mine mill expansion, expected to lift processing capacity by about 36% in the second half of 2026, ongoing dewatering at Redwing, and new leadership under CEO Tulani Sikwila support a constructive outlook that underpins the maintained $9.50 per share target and Buy recommendation.
data.author: TipRanks Auto-Generated Intelligence Newsdesk
